'''Patrick Coyle''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who portrayed [[Kir Kanos]] in the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio dramatization of ''Crimson Empire'']].<ref name="Crimson Empire">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' audio drama]]</ref> Coyle also voiced [[Nathan Donar III|Nathan Donar]] and various unnamed characters in the [[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]].<ref name="Dark Forces">[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]]</ref>

|-
| [[1999]] || [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'']]||[[Kir Kanos]]<ref name="Crimson Empire" />
